title: MANAGEMENT WANTED: SURVIVAL PATCH!
description: A Data pack that allows those that use management wanted to craft a majority of the animatronics.
body:
- This data pack has been made to bring a large majority of the Management wanted animatronics to survival, making use of the endo's in a vast number of crafting recipes.
```
None Craftable:
All the Phantoms & Xor.
The Movie Versions.
Helpi & his Varients.
The rest should be craftable.
```
- Keeping the core night to night gameplay, crafting recipes for the withered animatronics, shadows and the jrs all still require the base versions to be made, so it won't feel like your ditching the base mod.
```
- All crafting recipes can be seen within the crafting bench libary so if you don't use mods like JEI or EAI you are able to find the recipes with this data pack and management wanted standalone.
```
